race.comment: SILVER MAGNATE (13) is a tricky one. He'd promised plenty last time in but has been underwhelming in two runs back - albeit he's been three wide and too far back in both. He was well backed at Pakenham Synthetic last time, tipping onto the big turf track here and drawn well he can turn things around. STAY HUMBLE (5) has been good in two runs back, finishing third each time. He tried hard behind a progressive winner last time and should be ready to peak up in trip from a soft gate. JOIN THE QUE (3) beat SILVER MAGNATE comfortably last time out to continue an excellent run of form. No issue back to turf and he can win again. STAY SILENT (2) is racing consistently and should roll forward to take catching from out wide. JENNI MULTABELLA (14) ran well fresh and should improve, she's got upside and is firmly in the mix.
